flashcards.definition: Pollution from an identifiable, localized source (e.g., factory discharge pipe, sewage treatment plant).
Pollution from diffuse sources (agricultural runoff, urban stormwater); harder to control than point sources.
Excess nutrient enrichment (nitrogen, phosphorus) causing algal blooms, oxygen depletion, and aquatic die-offs.
Amount of oxygen consumed by microorganisms decomposing organic matter; high BOD indicates polluted water.
Strip of vegetation along waterways that filters pollutants, reduces erosion, and provides habitat.
